info_CN: 减论Agent通过算法为您推荐
慕尼黑工业大学推出了基于TUM Traffic Accident数据集的Accid3nD事故检测方法
该方法结合规则与学习机制
利用多视角摄像头和LiDAR数据实现对高速公路交通事故的精准识别与跟踪
and SETLabs Research GmbH presented Accid3nD

an accident detection model that combines a rule-based approach with a learning-based one using the TUM Traffic Accident dataset consisting of labeled 2D and 3D vehicle crash sequences recorded from roadside cameras and LiDARs
info_EN: and SETLabs Research GmbH presented Accid3nD

an accident detection model that combines a rule-based approach with a learning-based one using the TUM Traffic Accident dataset consisting of labeled 2D and 3D vehicle crash sequences recorded from roadside cameras and LiDARs
